text.title: FinOps Cost Alerts and Anomaly Workflow Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules including a `skip-this-methodology` rule. Each pairs a binary check with sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Budget alerts MUST fire at 50/75/90/100% of budget; single-threshold alerting rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Anomaly detector MUST be enabled per account/project; relying solely on monthly review rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Each alert MUST route to a named owner via Slack / PagerDuty / email — not to a shared #cost channel.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Anomaly investigation MUST follow a structured template (impact, suspected cause, remediation) — free-form skipped.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Executive cost report MUST be published at least monthly with action items.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Skip when no tagging baseline OR budgets cannot be set per team.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.
